key_models.social.account: Connected social media account. Key fields: name, media_type (facebook, instagram, linkedin, twitter, youtube), media_id, account_id, is_media_disconnected, company_id, social_page_ids.
key_models.social.page: Social page managed by an account. Key fields: name, account_id, page_id, is_selected, media_type, sequence.
key_models.social.post: Social post to publish. Key fields: name, message, post_message, account_ids, live_post_ids, scheduled_date, state (draft/scheduled/posted/failed), campaign_id, utm_source_id, utm_medium_id, image_ids, is_ai_content, ai_prompt.
key_models.social.live.post: Per-account published post. Key fields: post_id, account_id, state (draft/scheduled/posted/failed/ready/published), live_coverage_ref, page_id, engagement metrics (like_count, comment_count, share_count, impression_count).
key_models.social.stream: Stream configuration for monitoring. Key fields: name, media_type, stream_type, account_id, search_term, sequence.
key_models.social.stream.post: Post collected from a stream. Key fields: stream_id, author_name, message, link, published_date, like_count, comment_count, share_count, is_favorite.
key_models.utm.campaign: Marketing campaign. Key fields: name, user_id, stage_id, tag_ids. Social posts reference it via campaign_id.
key_models.utm.source: Traffic source. Social posts set utm_source_id (e.g., 'Facebook', 'LinkedIn').
key_models.utm.medium: Traffic medium. Social posts set utm_medium_id (e.g., 'Social').

key_files.social_marketing/models/social_account.p: Social account model with OAuth state and media connection
key_files.social_marketing/models/social_page.py: Social page model for linked pages
key_files.social_marketing/models/social_post.py: Core post model with scheduling, publishing, media, campaign links
key_files.social_marketing/models/social_live_post: Live post instances per account with engagement metrics
key_files.social_marketing/models/utm_campaign.py: UTM campaign integration with social posts

crons.social_post_cron: Publish scheduled posts (periodic, active by default). Model: social.post, method: _publish_scheduled_posts
crons.social_stream_refresh_cron: Refresh social streams (periodic). Model: social.stream, method: _refresh_streams

security_groups.social_marketing.group_social_marketing_: Create and manage social posts, accounts, streams, and campaigns
Full configuration: accounts, streams, crons, all posts, settings
security_groups.base.group_system: Required for social account OAuth setup and technical settings
security_groups.base.group_user: Internal users can view published posts and dashboards
